messages.text: BL-531 🎵 in progress — Pre-QA durability and wiring gate (cut behavior-bounce storm)

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-531 — Pre-QA durability and wiring gate — swarm_handoff.sh refuses a QA-bound parcel whose lineage drops a ticket commit or whose ticket-declared wiring never landed
Approval context: Needs sign-off before the coder starts, because this wires a REFUSAL into
`swarm_handoff.sh` — the single chokepoint every handoff in the swarm passes
through. A false positive stops the pipeline, not just one parcel.

Specifically firm, please confirm or overturn:
- Arming at the QA edge only, not…
BL-531 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-531" (or "reject BL-531 <reason>") to act.
